feedback.text: To whom it may concern, I strongly wish for the European Commission to consider the Digital Fairness Act as not only will it enforce righteous ownership of digital media to each respective buyer but it will also ensure the preservation of the video game medium as a whole while halting the constant risk of extermination against countless video games. Hundreds of video games have already been destroyed, wiping away years of effort from hardworking developers and forever vanishing priceless digital history, this unjust and immoral practice should not continue. Best Regards.
